task: Analyze why Agentrix ForkAttention may outperform FlashAttention for long shared-prefix, high-fanout agent inference. Use the local Agentrix experiment documents to identify the mechanism, limitations, fair benchmark requirements, and the next optimization priorities. Reconcile conflicting evidence instead of assuming every reported speedup generalizes.

Prepare an evidence-grounded deployment review for Agentrix ForkAttention. Retrieve the local build, benchmark, CUDA Graph, offload, and data-parallel documentation; identify which settings are required for a fair production evaluation and which claims still need validation.
